name: Imagga Image Recognition API
description: Imagga provides a powerful image recognition REST API for auto-tagging, categorization, color extraction, face detection, content moderation, visual search, cropping, background removal, and OCR. The API analyzes image content and returns structured metadata suitable for digital asset management, content moderation, e-commerce, and media applications.
